title: Nakleo 3x Snow Spray for Christmas Decorations plus FREE Stencils, 250 ml White, Artificial Fake Snow Effect for Window, Christmas Tree, Snowflake, DIY Arts and Crafts Home Decor Xmas
features: CREATIVE DECORATIONS FOR CHRISTMAS: Self-decorated Christmas cards with Santa Claus, snowflakes spraying on the windows, the smell of cookies decorated with Christmas patterns like bells, snowman or christmas tree - the possibilities are endless. Just use artificial spray snow, glitter, silver and gold paint, or any other decoration and repaint the pattern! Making your own decorations is a great idea for creative ways to spend your spare time. Afterwards, your home will look like never before.
PRODUCT SAFETY: Use in accordance with the instruction on the packaging. Not suitable for children under 3 years old. Product meet the strict safety regulations of the European Union, UK and US.
MADE IN BELGIUM: our artificial snow spray is fully manufactured in the European Union and stands out for its excellent quality, whiteness and durability.
EASY TO USE: Very effective and convenient to use. Extremely easy to wash off from glass and other surfaces.

HIGH PERFORMANCE SET – Includes three 250 ml (200 g) cans of high-quality artificial snow, offering excellent coverage and a beautifully fluffy texture. Perfect for window decorations, festive art, and DIY Christmas crafts. Just shake and spray for instant winter magic – and get two FREE reusable stencils to create stunning holiday scenes full of sparkle and creativity.
description: Product Description We are Nakleo! As Europe based stencil manufacturer and a family company we are mixing unique designs with highest product quality and individual approach to every customer. Artificial Snow Spray for Christmas Stencils Invite the Magic of Christmas time into your home! The highly effective artificial snow spray from the Nakleo Accessories series is an absolutely indispensable element when making all kinds of Christmas decorations. It can be used on many surfaces such as paper, wood, glass and metal. It is extremely useful for decorating windows, Christmas trees, reeds, etc. It is ideal for creating Xmas decorations complete with our reusable Christmas Stencils Collection. HANDMADE DECORATIONS - make your own scenery, decorate home or shop windows with our stencil patterns, spray Christmas tree branches or wreaths to make them look naturally frosted. MADE IN BELGIUM - our artificial snow spray is fully manufactured in the European Union and stands out for its excellent quality, whiteness and durability. EASY TO USE - Very effective and convenient to use. Extremely easy to wash off from glass and other surfaces. UNIVERSAL APPLICATION - suitable for use on a wide variety of surfaces such as paper, cardboard, wood, metal, glass, etc. Stands out for good adhesion and coverage. HIGH PERFORMANCE - 250nml (100g) spray can make our artificial snow extremely effective. Just shake it up and let your imagination run wild creating incredible Christmas decorations.
